sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-03-08 07:43
- Distance: 14 km
- Moving time: 1:28:38
- Elapsed time: 1:29:14
- Elevation gain: 76.2 m
- Average heart rate: 166.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 185 bpm
- Average watts: 181.9 W
- Average speed: 9.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `6` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `167.2 bpm`, ranging from `144.0` to `179.6 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `158.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `175.8 bpm` (+17.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `158.6 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `163.8 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `161.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `155.7 spm` (-6.2 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:19 /km` across `14.018 km` in `1:28:38` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:25 /km` and second-half pace was `6:13 /km` (-12 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `166.5 bpm` average and `185 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `159.1 bpm` in the first half and `174.3 bpm` in the second (+15.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:28:38` out of `1:29:14` elapsed (99.3%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `2` stop segments and `0.2%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `124.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.0 m` and `21.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `63.2 m` in the first half and `61.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
